title: containerImageRef.NewImageSource(): don't always force timestamps
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind bug

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Since #2571, we've been accidentally setting the timestamp on all of the content in new layers to the current date when the `--timestamp` flag was not specified, which is a conformance break.

#### How to verify it

Multiple conformance tests, including `TestConformance/add`, flagged new differences in the mtime on various bits of content in layers.  They should be passing again.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```
None
```
